ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt By The Former Trustee For Distrbution Of Net Reserve
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petn. For Approval Of Compromise Re: Trust
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa Carvalho for Mellon BNY. Norman Glickman for Susan Eben. Andrew Pierce (Guardian Ad Litem) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that there was concern about the potential conflict of interest that could arise with Mr. Glickamn being the attorney for the Beneficiary and the acting Trustee. Mr. Glickman stated that he would resign as Counsel for Susan Eben if he was appointed as the Trustee. The Court granted all three petitions and will sign the orders upon the filing of Mr. Glickman's substitution of attorney.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
